item.title: And … We’re Off! - WSPTA
item.description: News article "And … We’re Off! - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.

item.title: 👎Tanya English - Washington Education Association
item.description: Tanya English signed up to testify Con.

item.title: 👍💵Alex Hur - Communities in Schools of Washington
item.description: Alex Hur signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Communities in Schools of Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Ramona Hattendorf - The Arc of King County
item.description: Ramona Hattendorf signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent The Arc of King County. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Jen Chong Jewell - Washington State Board of Education
item.description: Jen Chong Jewell signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington State Board of Education.

item.title: 👎Lisa Guthrie - Lake Washington School District Board of Directors
item.description: Lisa Guthrie signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Lake Washington School District Board of Directors.

item.title: 👍💵Nasue Nishida - Washington Education Association
item.description: Nasue Nishida signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Education Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Misha Cherniske - Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction
item.description: Misha Cherniske signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Office of Superintendent of Public Instruction.

item.title: See you at Focus Day! - WSPTA
item.description: News article "See you at Focus Day! - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.
